about.title: About Me
about.story:
Hello, I'm Shoyu, a developer passionate about technology and creation. My curiosity for computers started at a young age, and from the first "Hello World", I embarked on this journey full of challenges and surprises.

I believe code is not just a tool, but a way to express creativity. Outside of work, I enjoy exploring new technologies, reading, gaming, and nurturing that other side of myself in the digital world — Sakuryne.
about.philosophy: "Code is poetry, logic is rhythm, creation is freedom."

music.title: Music
music.desc: Love J-Pop, electronic music, and Lo-Fi. Often listen to Fujii Kaze, YOASOBI, and various game soundtracks while working.

gaming.title: Gaming
gaming.desc: RPG and indie game player. Favorites include Zelda, Hades, and various pixel art indie games.

collecting.title: Collecting
collecting.desc: Collect mechanical keyboards and interesting gadgets. Each keyboard has its own story and tactile memory.

character.title: Character Profile
character.name: Sakuryne
character.subtitle: // Cyber Spirit
character.originValue: Dimensional rift where code meets cherry blossoms
character.likes: Late Night Coding,Matcha Latte,Perfect Code,Cherry Blossoms,Electronic Music
character.description: Born from a dimensional fluctuation during a late-night debugging session, Sakuryne is Shoyu's other side in the digital world. Playful but focused when working, loves dancing in the glow of the IDE at midnight.

dialogues.speaker: Sakuryne
dialogues.text: Master, master! This bug looks like a little bunny!

dialogues.speaker: Shoyu
dialogues.text: ...That's a memory leak, not a bunny. Go make me some coffee.

dialogues.speaker: Sakuryne
dialogues.text: Roger that! Matcha latte with double espresso, programmer's special~

dialogues.speaker: Sakuryne
dialogues.text: Master, why do humans always say 'just one more version' and then pull all-nighters?

dialogues.speaker: Shoyu
dialogues.text: That's the romance of programmers. You wouldn't understand.

dialogues.speaker: Sakuryne
dialogues.text: I understand! Just like when I say 'just one more video' and then it's morning!
